name: orbuc
description: Independent on-chain stablecoin market cap and Bitcoin institutional holdings data. 12 tools covering 13 stablecoins across 19 chains, and BTC holdings across 6 institutional segments. Sourced directly from smart contract RPC calls and SEC EDGAR filings — no third-party aggregators.

pricing.note: Currently free and open access. x402 micropayment pricing may be introduced in future.

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_mcap
tools.description: Get historical daily total stablecoin market cap across all tracked issuers

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_latest
tools.description: Get the latest full snapshot of all tracked stablecoins with per-issuer and per-chain breakdown

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_coin
tools.description: Get historical supply data for a specific stablecoin

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_coin_latest
tools.description: Get the latest supply data for a specific stablecoin with chain breakdown

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_aggregate
tools.description: Get daily aggregate stablecoin data by total, symbol, or chain level

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_chains
tools.description: Get stablecoin supply distribution across chains

tools.name: orbuc_btc_holdings_current
tools.description: Get the latest total BTC held by institutions broken down by segment

tools.name: orbuc_btc_holdings_segments
tools.description: Get current BTC holdings per segment with confidence levels and data sources

tools.name: orbuc_btc_holdings_daily
tools.description: Get daily BTC holdings time series optionally filtered by segment

tools.name: orbuc_btc_holdings_weekly
tools.description: Get weekly aggregated BTC holdings optionally filtered by segment

tools.name: orbuc_btc_health
tools.description: Check health of the BTC holdings tracker

tools.name: orbuc_stablecoin_health
tools.description: Check health of the stablecoin market cap tracker
